name: Mighty Stand
summary: This stand is designed specifically for the Mighty Vaporiser from Storz & Bickel.
description: This stand is designed specifically for the Mighty Vaporiser from Storz & Bickel. It allows your device to remain upright while loading herb or using your AC adapter, providing practical functionality and convenience. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
